message:
fix(sync,cli): prevent symlink/gitdir invariant bypass via early canonicalization, and fix boolean CLI override propagation

Sync path validation (sync.rs):
- Extract resolve_requested_sync_path() helper that resolves relative
  JSONL paths to absolute without collapsing the final path component,
  so that raw-path validation can still inspect the operator's actual
  requested path for symlink and .git invariant violations that would
  otherwise be hidden by eager dunce::canonicalize
- Remove the special-case branch that canonicalized existing JSONL paths
  before validation, which allowed a symlink pointing outside the beads
  directory or into .git to pass the safety checks
- Add two Unix-only tests: one verifying symlinked-external-jsonl
  rejection with opt-in, and one verifying .git-symlinked-jsonl
  rejection even with opt-in

CLI overrides (main.rs):
- Fix build_cli_overrides to only set no_db and no_daemon to Some(true)
  when the corresponding flags are explicitly passed, rather than always
  wrapping the bool value (which was producing Some(false) and overriding
  config-file or env-var settings when the flag was absent)
- Add test verifying --no-db is correctly propagated as Some(true)
- Add test verifying absent startup bool flags produce None (not Some(false))

Minor:
- Formatting cleanup in config test and e2e BD_DB override test
- Beads issue tracker state update

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
